properties.name: text
properties.value: Everyone's boat but mine -- I'll follow once the last one's free.

properties.name: text
properties.value: She untied every line but her own.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Everyone's shift but mine ends at the sound. I keep counting anyway.

properties.name: text
properties.value: If you stack them right, they listen back.

properties.name: text
properties.value: Front row, both of us. He said don't blink.

properties.name: text
properties.value: It never lands anywhere else now. I've checked.

properties.name: text
properties.value: We didn't lock her in. We tried to keep it out.

properties.name: text
properties.value: He wrote his own name in last, every time, like it might come out different.

properties.name: text
properties.value: They clapped until the water was over their heads. He never once turned around.
